title: Leontodon scopulorum

It is native to the Western Cape province of South Africa, where it is found in the fynbos vegetation type. This plant is a member of the genus Leontodon, which consists of various dandelion-like species. The genus Leontodon is part of the tribe Cichorieae, within the Asteraceae family. Further classification places Leontodon scopulorum within the subfamily Cichorioideae.
